pageContext.name: Classic Loki Variant Deluxe
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the BDS Art Scale 1:10 line - Classic Loki Variant Deluxe! Based on original references from Marvel Studios: Loki on Disney Plus, this polystone Marvel statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   Marvel fans, don't miss your chance to add this Classic Loki figure (Deluxe) to your Marvel collection!
